texto: Homeschooling and public schooling are as opposite as two sides of a coin. In a homeschooling environment, the teacher need not be certified, but the child MUST learn. In a public school environment, the teacher MUST be certified, but the child need NOT learn.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gene Royer sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Homeschooling and public schooling are as opposite as two sides of a coin. In a homeschooling env…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, homeschool, útil em momentos de homeschool e homeschooling.
